Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-30-2002 Text Ruling

MOTION To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Apr-30-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant PACIFIC TELESIS/SBC's motion to enforce settlement agreement per CCP 664.6 -- Both Judge Robertson and Judge McBride have recused themselves from hearing this matter. Matter referred to Department 206 for reassignment by the Presiding Judge. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
